scripts.vercel-build: npx convex deploy --cmd 'npm run write-convex-env && npm run build' --cmd-url-env-var-name NEXT_PUBLIC_CONVEX_URL
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n convex,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:convex" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace web && eslint --config eslint.config.mjs convex
scripts.test: vitest run && npm run test --workspace voetbalgazet-research-idea
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace web && tsc --noEmit -p convex/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p emails/tsconfig.json && npm run typecheck --workspace voetbalgazet-research-idea
